batting.QAB: Quality at bats (any one of: 3 pitches after 2 strikes, 6+ pitch ABs, XBH, HHB, BB, SAC Bunt, SAC Fly)
batting.QAB%: Quality at bats per plate appearance
batting.HHB: Hard hit balls: Total line drives and hard ground balls
batting.BABIP: Batting average on balls in play
batting.BA/RISP: Batting average with runners in scoring position
batting.2S+3: Plate appearances in which batter sees 3+ pitches after 2 strikes
batting.2S+3%: % of plate appearances in which batter sees 3+ pitches after 2 strikes

pitching.WHIP: Walks plus hits per innings pitched
pitching.<3%: % of batters on or out in three pitches or less
pitching.FPSO%: % of FPS at-bats that result in an out
pitching.FPSW%: % of FPS at-bats that result in a walk
pitching.FPSH%: % of FPS at-bats that result in a hit
pitching.LOBBS: Leadoff walk that scored (1st batter of inning)
pitching.SM%: % of total pitches that are swings and misses
pitching.WEAK%: % of batted balls weakly hit (fly balls and ground balls)
pitching.HHB%: % of batted balls that are line drives or hard ground balls
pitching.GO/AO: Ratio of ground outs to air outs
pitching.GB%: % of all batted balls hit on the ground
pitching.BABIP: Opponent batting average on balls in play
pitching.BA/RISP: Opponent batting average with runners in scoring position
pitching.FB: Number of pitches thrown as Fastballs
pitching.FBS: Number of Fastballs thrown for strikes
pitching.FBS%: Percentage of Fastballs thrown for strikes
pitching.FBSM%: Percentage of Fastballs swung at and missed
pitching.CB: Number of pitches thrown as Curveballs
pitching.CBS: Number of Curveballs thrown for strikes
pitching.CBS%: Percentage of Curveballs thrown for strikes
pitching.CBSM%: Percentage of Curveballs swung at and missed
pitching.CT: Number of pitches thrown as Cutters
pitching.CTS: Number of Cutters thrown for strikes
pitching.CTS%: Percentage of Cutters thrown for strikes
pitching.CTSM%: Percentage of Cutters swung at and missed
pitching.SL: Number of pitches thrown as Sliders
pitching.SLS: Number of Sliders thrown for strikes
pitching.SLS%: Percentage of Sliders thrown for strikes
pitching.SLSM%: Percentage of Sliders swung at and missed
pitching.CH: Number of pitches thrown as Changeups
pitching.CHS: Number of Changeups thrown for strikes
pitching.CHS%: Percentage of Changeups thrown for strikes
pitching.CHSM%: Percentage of Changeups swung at and missed
pitching.OS: Number of pitches thrown as Offspeeds
pitching.OSS: Number of Offspeeds thrown for strikes
pitching.OSS%: Percentage of Offspeeds thrown for strikes
pitching.OSSM%: Percentage of Offspeeds swung at and missed
